description_long: This handgun features a striking gold and brown zebra-stripe pattern across its slide and frame, giving it a bold, custom appearance. The grip panels are a light, ivory-like material adorned with a detailed image of the Virgin of Guadalupe, adding a unique and personal touch. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a smooth finish and no visible undercuts or aggressive texturing. The barrel is short and standard, with a metallic finish visible at the muzzle, and no external threading or compensator. The slide is free of visible manufacturer markings or serial numbers, focusing attention on the decorative pattern. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile without extensions or finger rests.
description: A gold and brown zebra-striped handgun with ivory-like grips featuring a Virgin of Guadalupe image and a flat magazine base. The design is bold and decorative, with a smooth, rounded trigger guard and a standard metallic barrel.
description_view_0: The handgun is seen from the rear, highlighting the zebra-striped slide and the narrow profile of the grip and frame.
description_view_1: The left side view showcases the full zebra-stripe pattern, the Virgin of Guadalupe image on the grip, and the smooth, rounded trigger guard.
description_view_2: The front view emphasizes the metallic barrel opening, the concentric muzzle, and the continuation of the zebra-stripe pattern around the slide.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, displaying the zebra-stripe pattern and the Virgin of Guadalupe image on the grip, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and magazine base.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with a smooth, slightly curved profile, made from a material resembling synthetic ivory. It features a prominent, full-color image of the Virgin of Guadalupe embedded in the center, bordered by a subtle frame. The surface is glossy and lacks aggressive texturing, providing a sleek, decorative appearance rather than a tactical one. There are no visible finger grooves or checkering, and the grip panels are flush with the frame, enhancing the streamlined look. The embellishment is the most distinctive element, making the grip visually unique.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, with a smooth, continuous curve and no undercuts or squared-off edges. It is integrated seamlessly into the frame, lacking any visible reinforcement or aggressive texturing. The design is classic and functional, prioritizing comfort and simplicity over tactical enhancements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and standard, with a metallic, slightly reflective finish visible at the muzzle. It is not threaded, ported, or fluted, and there are no compensators or external attachments. The exterior is smooth, with no visible markings or engravings.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations on the slide. The only decorative element is the bold gold and brown zebra-stripe pattern that covers the entire slide surface.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined and unobtrusive profile. There are no extensions, finger rests, or visible logos, and the base is smooth, matching the overall aesthetic of the handgun.
